visualizerParams.title: Binary AND Logic Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The manual binary AND implementation is not producing correct results. It seems the bitwise comparison logic is wrong. Identify and fix the flaw.

solution.explanation: The bitwise AND operation returns 1 only if BOTH corresponding bits are 1. The buggy code incorrectly used the `or` condition, which implements a bitwise OR instead of an AND.
